response.original_title: Azusa 無邪気な君に恋をする・東雲あずさ
response.overview: Azusa Shinonome, affectionately known as Azunyan, leads this work with her charming smile, smooth glossy hair and distinctive symmetrical canines that highlight her expressions. Although she was nervous at first—this being her first image shoot—she soon relaxed and revealed her warm, spontaneous personality. She quickly bonded with the staff and even showed off a playful handstand between takes. In the scene with the cat toy, her reaction is completely genuine, making it one of the most natural highlights of the video. When asked about her favorite moment, she candidly said that the exercise scenes are "hopeless," yet she hopes viewers enjoy them for their unpolished charm. Her innocence, sincerity and earnest effort make her presence genuinely captivating.
response.title: Azusa: Mujaki na Kimi ni Koi o Suru - Azusa Shinonome

titles.title: Azusa Mujaki na Kimi ni Koi o Suru・Shinonome Azusa
